title: Scorecard model retarget procedure
description:
Purpose: create a deterministic procedure that bulk-creates non-champion score versions for every selected score on a scorecard with a new model configuration.

Definition of Done:
- Procedure supports dry-run and apply modes.
- LangGraphScore root model fields and TactusScore default_model/runtime controls are updated deterministically.
- Existing champion versions are used as parents.
- No score is promoted to champion.
- Unsupported score classes fail loudly unless excluded.
- Behavior is covered by Gherkin and executable tests.
